title: test 0010
body:
this is a test 


Please update the app's color theme from the warm yellow/cream 
Apple Notes style to a subtle Slack-inspired purple theme. 

Use these as a guide:
- Sidebar background: a deep muted purple (like #3F0E40 or similar to Slack's sidebar)
- Sidebar text and note titles: white or light lavender
- Active/selected note highlight: a medium purple accent
- New Note button: Slack's purple or a lighter violet accent
- Editor area: clean white or very light lavender (#FAFAFA or #F9F7FF)
- Toolbar: light purple-gray
- Search bar: slightly darker than the sidebar
- Autosave indicator and accents: a soft violet

Keep the overall layout exactly the same — just change the colors.
